## about

I build software — mostly web things, occasionally systems stuff. Interested in the space where UI/UX meets clean architecture. I run small experiments, break things on purpose, and learn by building.

<br>

## projects

<table width="100%" border="0" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top" style="padding-right: 12px;">
      <p><strong>void</strong><br>
      <sub>Minimal UI primitives — components stripped to essentials.</sub></p>
    </td>
    <td width="50%" valign="top" style="padding-left: 12px;">
      <p><strong>pulse</strong><br>
      <sub>Lightweight dev server monitoring with real-time metrics.</sub></p>
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top" style="padding-right: 12px; padding-top: 16px;">
      <p><strong>drift</strong><br>
      <sub>Experimental state layer for distributed frontend architecture.</sub></p>
    </td>
    <td width="50%" valign="top" style="padding-left: 12px; padding-top: 16px;">
      <p><strong>nexus</strong><br>
      <sub>End-to-end type-safe client for modern API ecosystems.</sub></p>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>
